name: Tobacco Cessation Counseling and Intervention Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for tobacco cessation counseling, behavioral interventions, and pharmacotherapy. Used in the tobacco cessation intervention component of the tobacco screening measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Smoking and tobacco use cessation counseling visit; intermediate, 3-10 minutes
Smoking and tobacco use cessation counseling visit; intensive, greater than 10 minutes
Patient screened for tobacco use AND received tobacco cessation intervention
Smoking cessation classes, non-physician provider, per session
Smoking and tobacco cessation counseling visit for the asymptomatic patient; intermediate, 3-10 min
Smoking and tobacco cessation counseling visit for the asymptomatic patient; intensive, greater than 10 min
Current smokeless tobacco user, received cessation intervention
Patient identified as tobacco user received cessation intervention during the measurement period
